title: Nursery Rhyme. LXXVI. Tales.
content:
There was a king and he had three daughter,
        And they all lived in a basin of water;
            The basin bended,
            My story's ended.
        If the basin had been stronger,
        My story would have been longer.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. LXXVI. Tales.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
